PERCYJACKSON-STRIKE_PERCY.title: Strike
PERCYJACKSON-DEFEND_PERCY.title: Defend
PERCYJACKSON-DISARM.title: Disarm
PERCYJACKSON-BACKSWING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Combo[/gold] {ComboX:diff()}: Draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s} for each previous card in this [gold]Combo[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-BACKSWING.title: Backswing
PERCYJACKSON-NOBODY_TOUCH_HER.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {HitCount:diff()} time{HitCount:plural:|s}. Raise the [gold]Tide[/gold] by {HitCount:diff()}.
PERCYJACKSON-NOBODY_TOUCH_HER.title: Nobody Touch Her!
PERCYJACKSON-QUICK_PARRY.title: Quick Parry
PERCYJACKSON-UNEXPECTED_STRATEGY.descrip: Choose {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s} in your [gold]Hand[/gold] that is not already a [gold]Combo[/gold] card to gain [gold]Combo Starter[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-UNEXPECTED_STRATEGY.title: Unexpected Strategy
PERCYJACKSON-UNEXPECTED_STRATEGY.selecti: Choose a card to gain Combo Starter.
PERCYJACKSON-PEN_CAP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
After playing {Cards:diff()} Attacks, return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-PEN_CAP.title: Pen Cap
PERCYJACKSON-SEAS_EMBRACE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
Transform non-Attacks in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [gold]Water[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-SEAS_EMBRACE.title: Embrace of the Sea
PERCYJACKSON-NO_SWEAT.description: For every 4 cards you play in a [gold]Combo[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
PERCYJACKSON-NO_SWEAT.title: No Sweat
PERCYJACKSON-INCOMING_WAVE.title: Incoming Wave
PERCYJACKSON-RIDE_THE_WAVE.description:
Raise the [gold]Tide[/gold] by {Tide:diff()}.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s}.
Next turn, draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s}.
PERCYJACKSON-RIDE_THE_WAVE.title: Ride The Wave
PERCYJACKSON-ST_LOUIS_ARCH.title: St Louis' Arch
PERCYJACKSON-SURFACE_TENSION.description: At the start of your turn, raise the [gold]Tide[/gold] by {Tide:diff()}.
PERCYJACKSON-SURFACE_TENSION.title: Surface Tension
PERCYJACKSON-MYTHOMAGIC.description:
Return a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] back to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s}.
PERCYJACKSON-MYTHOMAGIC.title: Mythomagic
PERCYJACKSON-MYTHOMAGIC.selectionScreenP: Choose a card to return to your Draw Pile.
PERCYJACKSON-HIGH_TIDE.title: High Tide
PERCYJACKSON-SURFING_LESSONS.title: Surfing Lessons
PERCYJACKSON-ABSORB.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for each level of [gold]Tide[/gold].
Lose all [gold]Tide[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-ABSORB.title: Absorb
PERCYJACKSON-CAPTURE_THE_FLAG.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {HitCount:diff()} time{HitCount:plural:|s}.
Increase the number of times this attack hits by {HitIncrease:diff()} this combat.
PERCYJACKSON-CAPTURE_THE_FLAG.title: Capture The Flag
PERCYJACKSON-STORMBRINGER.description:
Raise the maximum [gold]Tide[/gold] by X{PlusDamage:cond:>0?+1|}.
Set the [gold]Tide[/gold] to its maximum.
PERCYJACKSON-STORMBRINGER.title: Stormbringer
PERCYJACKSON-GETTING_SERIOUS.title: Getting Serious
PERCYJACKSON-WIND_UP.title: Wind Up
PERCYJACKSON-FREE_THE_AQUARIUM.descripti:
Choose {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s} in your [gold]Hand[/gold] that you can't play.
If the card was an Attack or Skill, add a copy into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] that costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(0)} until played{IfUpgraded:hide: and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] this}.
PERCYJACKSON-FREE_THE_AQUARIUM.title: Free The Aquarium
PERCYJACKSON-WAVE_PUNCH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deals {TideDamage:diff()} additional damage for all [gold]Tide[/gold] gained this combat.
PERCYJACKSON-WAVE_PUNCH.title: Wave Punch
PERCYJACKSON-ERUPTION.title: Eruption
PERCYJACKSON-WHIRLPOOL.description:
Lower the [gold]Tide[/gold] to 0.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies a number of times equal to the [gold]Tide[/gold] lost.
PERCYJACKSON-WHIRLPOOL.title: Whirlpool
PERCYJACKSON-WATER_WALKING.description: Whenever you play a card this turn, gain {Tide:diff()} [gold]Tide[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-WATER_WALKING.title: Walking on Water
PERCYJACKSON-BUBBLE.description: Whenever the [gold]Tide[/gold] goes over its maximum, gain {Block} [gold]Block[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-BUBBLE.title: Bubble
PERCYJACKSON-UNWAVERING.description: The first {Times:plural:time|{Times:diff()} times} you consume [gold]Vigor[/gold] each turn, reapply your [gold]Vigor[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-UNWAVERING.title: Unwavering
PERCYJACKSON-IMMERSION.description:
Add a [gold]Water[/gold] to all [gold]Combat Piles[/gold].
Activate all [gold]Water[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
PERCYJACKSON-IMMERSION.title: Immersion
PERCYJACKSON-FEINT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next card in this [gold]Combo[/gold] costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(0)}.
PERCYJACKSON-FEINT.title: Feint
PERCYJACKSON-GREEK_STYLE_IMPROV.descript: Next turn, all cards are [gold]Combo[/gold] cards and ignore [gold]Combo[/gold] count restrictions.
PERCYJACKSON-GREEK_STYLE_IMPROV.title: Greek-Style Improv
PERCYJACKSON-REFINED_TECHNIQUE.descripti:
[gold]Combo[/gold] {ComboX:diff()}: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {HitCount:diff()} time{HitCount:plural:|s}.
Hits once for each previous card in this [gold]Combo[/gold].
End your [gold]Combo[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-REFINED_TECHNIQUE.title: Refined Technique
PERCYJACKSON-LIFE_BUOY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put this card on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-LIFE_BUOY.title: Life Buoy
PERCYJACKSON-DEADLY_GAMBLE.description:
Shuffle ALL cards into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s}. If you drew a non-Attack, gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold]. Otherwise, gain {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-DEADLY_GAMBLE.title: Deadly Gamble
PERCYJACKSON-UNDERDOG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is not attacking, deal double damage and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-UNDERDOG.title: Underdog
PERCYJACKSON-ACHILLES_HEEL.description:
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and clear all stackable debuffs at the start of your turn.
You take double attack damage.
PERCYJACKSON-ACHILLES_HEEL.title: Achilles' Heel
PERCYJACKSON-AKHLYS_TORMENT.description: At the start of their turn, enemy loses HP equal to {TormentedPower:plural:|{TormentedPower:diff()} x }the sum of their debuffs and you add an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] copy of [gold]Guilt[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-AKHLYS_TORMENT.title: Akhlys' Torment
PERCYJACKSON-WOLF_STARE.title: Wolf Stare
PERCYJACKSON-DOUBLE_EDGED_SWORD.descript:
You and the enemy gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {HitCount:diff()} time{HitCount:plural:|s}.
PERCYJACKSON-DOUBLE_EDGED_SWORD.title: Double-Edged Sword
PERCYJACKSON-LIQUEFY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Transform a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]Water[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-LIQUEFY.title: Liquefy
PERCYJACKSON-DEEP_CUTS.title: Deep Cuts
PERCYJACKSON-BEHIND_YOU.title: Behind You
PERCYJACKSON-TIDE_SWEPT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Water[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-TIDE_SWEPT.title: Tide Swept
PERCYJACKSON-UNSEEN_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a copy of this card that costs an extra {IncreasedEnergy:energyIcons()} to your hand.
PERCYJACKSON-UNSEEN_STRIKE.title: Unseen Strike
PERCYJACKSON-SWORD_SHARPENING.descriptio:
All attacks this turn deal {SharpeningAmount:diff()} more damage.
Permanently increase this damage by {Increase:diff()}.
PERCYJACKSON-SWORD_SHARPENING.title: Sword Sharpening
PERCYJACKSON-WATER.title: Water
PERCYJACKSON-ZIG_ZAG.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {WoundedPower:diff()} [gold]Wounded[/gold] to ALL enemies.
PERCYJACKSON-ZIG_ZAG.title: Zig-Zag
PERCYJACKSON-CANT_SIT_STILL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {HitCount:diff()} time{HitCount:plural:|s}.
Hits once for each time you attacked the enemy this turn.
PERCYJACKSON-CANT_SIT_STILL.title: Can't Sit Still
PERCYJACKSON-YOU_DROOL.title: You Drool
PERCYJACKSON-VAPORIZE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If an enemy is left with less than 10% of their Max HP, kill them instantly.
PERCYJACKSON-VAPORIZE.title: Vaporize
PERCYJACKSON-ANCHOR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you draw an [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card, reduce the cost of this card by {EnergyDecrease:diff()}.
PERCYJACKSON-ANCHOR.title: Anchor
PERCYJACKSON-THRUST.title: Thrust
PERCYJACKSON-DEEP_SEA_TREASURE.descripti: At the end of your turn, reduce the cost of a random card in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to {energyPrefix:energyIcons(0)} until played.
PERCYJACKSON-DEEP_SEA_TREASURE.title: Deep Sea Treasure
PERCYJACKSON-ACCELERATED_BLEEDING.descri:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Trigger the enemy's [gold]Wounded[/gold] {HitCount:diff()} time{HitCount:plural:|s} and remove it.
PERCYJACKSON-ACCELERATED_BLEEDING.title: Accelerated Bleeding
PERCYJACKSON-PERMANENT_SCARRING.descript: [gold]Wounded[/gold] enemies take damage equal to their [gold]Wounded[/gold] at the start of the turn.
PERCYJACKSON-PERMANENT_SCARRING.title: Permanent Scarring
PERCYJACKSON-HIDDEN_RESERVOIR.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], increase this card's damage by {DamageIncrease:diff()}.
PERCYJACKSON-HIDDEN_RESERVOIR.title: Hidden Reservoir
PERCYJACKSON-TWIST_THE_BLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is [gold]Wounded[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage again.
PERCYJACKSON-TWIST_THE_BLADE.title: Twist The Blade
PERCYJACKSON-CATEGORY_FIVE.description:
Can only be played after shuffling your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] {ShuffleCount:diff()} time{ShuffleCount:plural:|s}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
PERCYJACKSON-CATEGORY_FIVE.title: Category Five
PERCYJACKSON-LET_IT_BE.description: Whenever you draw an [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card, draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s}.
PERCYJACKSON-LET_IT_BE.title: Let It Be
PERCYJACKSON-TETANUS.description: Every 3 times you apply [gold]Wounded[/gold], apply an equal amount of [gold]Poison[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-TETANUS.title: Tetanus
PERCYJACKSON-TERRIFIED_ANTICIPATION.desc: The first time you start a [gold]Combo[/gold] each turn, deal {DamageAmount:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
PERCYJACKSON-RAINBOW_HORSE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you activate [gold]Water[/gold], this card costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(0)} until played.
PERCYJACKSON-RAINBOW_HORSE.title: Rainbow Horse
PERCYJACKSON-HURRICANE_FORM.description: Whenever you deal unblocked attack damage to an enemy, deal {DamageAmount:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
PERCYJACKSON-HURRICANE_FORM.title: Hurricane Form
PERCYJACKSON-WAIT_FOR_IT.description:
[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
PERCYJACKSON-WAIT_FOR_IT.title: Wait For It
PERCYJACKSON-TEAMWORK.description: Whenever you end a [gold]Combo[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s} for each card in the [gold]Combo[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-TEAMWORK.title: Teamwork
PERCYJACKSON-YOU_DROPPED_THIS.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s} from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-YOU_DROPPED_THIS.title: You Dropped This
PERCYJACKSON-YOU_DROPPED_THIS.selectionS: Choose cards to return from the Discard Pile.
PERCYJACKSON-IVE_SEEN_HELL.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gains {AdditionalBlock:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold] for each stack of buffs that you have.
PERCYJACKSON-IVE_SEEN_HELL.title: I've Seen Hell
PERCYJACKSON-EBB_AND_FLOW.description: Swap {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s} in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] with {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s} in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-EBB_AND_FLOW.title: Ebb And Flow
PERCYJACKSON-EBB_AND_FLOW.drawPrompt: Choose cards to swap from your Draw Pile.
PERCYJACKSON-EBB_AND_FLOW.discardPrompt: Choose cards to swap from your Discard Pile.
PERCYJACKSON-SON_OF_NEPTUNE.description:
All [gold]Tide[/gold] gain and maximum [gold]Tide[/gold] gain is multiplied by {Mult:diff()}.
At the start of your turn, lower the maximum [gold]Tide[/gold] by {Decrease:diff()}.
PERCYJACKSON-SON_OF_NEPTUNE.title: Son Of Neptune
PERCYJACKSON-WAVE_AFTER_WAVE.title: Wave After Wave
PERCYJACKSON-SLASH_EM.description: Apply {WoundedPower:diff()} [gold]Wounded[/gold] and deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times.
PERCYJACKSON-SLASH_EM.title: Slash 'Em
PERCYJACKSON-HYDROGENESIS.description: At the start of your turn, add {Stacks:diff()} [gold]Water[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-HYDROGENESIS.title: Hydrogenesis
PERCYJACKSON-FLOOD.title: Flood
PERCYJACKSON-REINVIGORATION.title: Reinvigoration
PERCYJACKSON-ANAKLUSMOS.description: The first Attack you play each turn hits an additional time.
PERCYJACKSON-ANAKLUSMOS.title: Anaklusmos
PERCYJACKSON-TSUNAMI.title: Tsunami
PERCYJACKSON-PRECAUTION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Return a card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] back to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-PRECAUTION.title: Precaution
PERCYJACKSON-PRECAUTION.selectionScreenP: Choose a card to return to your Draw Pile.
PERCYJACKSON-WAVE_SHIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply [gold]Slow[/gold] to attackers this turn.
PERCYJACKSON-WAVE_SHIELD.title: Wave Shield
PERCYJACKSON-SAFE_SAILING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you manually drew a card this turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] again.
PERCYJACKSON-SAFE_SAILING.title: Safe Sailing
PERCYJACKSON-SUPERIOR_SWIMMING.descripti: Whenever you raise the maximum [gold]Tide[/gold], all enemies lose {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-SUPERIOR_SWIMMING.title: Superior Swimming
PERCYJACKSON-SEEING_RED.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {HitCount:diff()} time{HitCount:plural:|s}.
PERCYJACKSON-SEEING_RED.title: Seeing Red
PERCYJACKSON-HIGH_BUOYANCY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-HIGH_BUOYANCY.title: High Buoyancy
PERCYJACKSON-HOLDING_THE_SKY.description: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gains {ExtraBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-HOLDING_THE_SKY.title: Holding The Sky
PERCYJACKSON-PIERCING_STRIKE.title: Piercing Strike
PERCYJACKSON-PHLEGETHONS_WATERS.descript:
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Burn{Cards:plural:|s}[/gold] to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-PHLEGETHONS_WATERS.title: Phlegethon's Waters
PERCYJACKSON-BLADE_TRICKS.title: Blade Tricks
PERCYJACKSON-FRENZY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each multi-hit attack played this combat.{InCombat:
(Hits {HitCount:diff()} time{HitCount:plural:|s})}
PERCYJACKSON-FRENZY.title: Frenzy
PERCYJACKSON-TRUE_FINISHER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Combo multipliers affect this card twice.
PERCYJACKSON-TRUE_FINISHER.title: True Finisher
